name: 7 Times 4 Days
original_name: คู่มือเรียน คู่มือเลิฟ
overview: Won, a gentle Korean teacher-in-training, travels to Thailand to complete his studies and pursue his dream. Unexpectedly, he ends up sharing a house with Bonzai, a quiet and deeply sensitive high school student. As their contrasting worlds collide, awkward moments and emotional tension unfold—forcing them to navigate life under the same roof.

trailers.title: Web Drama Teaser: 7 Times 4 Days / คู่มือเรียน คู่มือเลิฟ
